message:
test(conformance): add runtime policy metamorphic cases (+12)

Runtime policy metamorphic relations (12 cases):
- threshold_monotonicity: accepted at T1 implies accepted at T2 > T1
- risk_ordering: lower risk always accepted if higher risk accepted
- mode_subsumption: rejected in hardened implies rejected in strict
- override_idempotent: applying override twice = applying once
- class_hierarchy_transitive: compatible < minor < major < breaking
- threshold_boundary: zero threshold rejects all, one accepts all
- class_acceptance: compatible always accepted in any mode
- class_rejection: breaking always rejected in strict mode
- audit_deterministic: same inputs produce same audit event
- decision_audit_order: decision independent of audit enabled

Completes full metamorphic coverage across all 14 domains.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -19,7 +19,7 @@
 | Iterator/transfer | 37 | 21 | 18 | 76 | Good - transfer/overlap/flatiter/broadcast, single-element, copy-overlap flags |
 | Shape/stride (SCE) | 51 | 12 | 12 | 75 | Good - 0-D, empty, negative-stride, large shapes, 5D/6D transpose, scalar-to-5D, F-order, reshape/transpose roundtrip metamorphic, incompatible/negative-infer adversarial |
 | Dtype promotion | 198 | 17 | 20 | 235 | Good - full 14×14 type matrix + metamorphic + adversarial, title-case/trailing-space |
-| Runtime policy | 37 | — | 12 | 49 | Good - risk thresholds, boundaries, override audit, unknown-class, exact-threshold |
+| Runtime policy | 37 | 12 | 12 | 61 | Good - risk thresholds, boundaries, override audit, unknown-class, exact-threshold, monotonicity/subsumption metamorphic |
 
 ## Priority Coverage Gaps
